title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Aster DM Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
